title: hieracium marmoreum subsp. auritum
intro: Hieracium marmoreum subsp. auritum, also known as the golden hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium marmoreum subsp. auritum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
